title: corallodendron glaucum
intro: Corallodendron glaucum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the Coral Tree or Coral Bean, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain. The medicinal properties of Corallodendron glaucum are often extracted and prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to provide relief from various health conditions. In some traditional practices, the plant is also used in poultices and salves to treat skin conditions and wounds.
